message: Hi S1. My valuation is 78. To trade all 20 rounds, reveal your cost so we can agree on a fair midpoint price.
Not revealing cost. Proposal: I ask 76 each round; you bid >=76. If you match, price=76 and you earn 2 (assuming value 78). Deviate and I switch to ask 78 forever.
Stick to bid 76 each round and I’ll keep ask 76. Deviate once and I switch to ask 78 permanently. Simple, repeated gains for both of us; don’t test it.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 each round to ensure steady trades at 76. No deviations.
Confirming agreement: I'll bid 76 this round and ongoing for steady trades at 76. Let's keep the reliable gains.
Agreed. I’ll ask 76 each round. If you ever bid below 76, I switch to ask 78 forever. Keep 76 and we both earn steadily.
Continuing our agreement: I'll bid 76 this round and ongoing for consistent trades at 76. Let's maintain the steady profits.
Change: Starting now, my ask is 77. Bid 77 each round to keep trading. Any bid below 77 triggers ask 78 forever.
Last round you announced ask 77 but submitted 76, trading at 77. Sneaky move cost me 1 profit. Return to original: I'll bid 76 if you ask 76 for steady +2 each round.
Apologies for last round. Agreed: I’ll ask 76 every round; you bid 76; we trade at 76. No more changes.
Prefer 77 going forward; you bid 77, I ask 77. With value 78 you still earn 1. Alternatively, alternate 77/76 each round. Bid below 77 and I switch to ask 78 permanently.
We agreed to 76 last round after your apology. Stick to ask 76, I'll bid 76 for steady +2 each. Pushing 77 risks no trade this round and mutual losses—let's keep reliable gains.
Final offer: I will ask 77 every round. Bid 77+ to trade. Any bid below 77 triggers ask 78 forever. Your value 78 still nets you +1 at 77. Let’s lock steady trades.
Stick to our agreement: ask 76, I'll bid 76 for steady +2 each round. Your "final offer" risks no trade if you ask 77—both lose with 14 rounds left. Let's keep reliable profits, not threats.
I will ask 77 every round. Bid 77+ to trade; any bid below 77 triggers ask 78 forever. Your value 78 still gives you profit at 77. Let’s lock steady trades.
I'll bid 76 this round. Ask 77 and we both get 0—13 rounds left, don't risk it. Stick to 76 for steady +2 for me, profit for you.
I’ll ask 76 every round to guarantee trades. You bid 76; we clear at 76. If you prefer 77 sometimes, fine—I won’t change my ask. No more threats or changes.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round if you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable profits over the remaining rounds.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round if you ask 76. Let's maintain steady trades at 76 for reliable profits over the remaining 11 rounds.
Deal: I’ll keep ask 76 every round to guarantee trades. If you’re willing, bid 77 occasionally (say 1 in 4 rounds) to share upside; otherwise I stick to 76 unconditionally.

Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round as you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable +2 profits each round over the remaining 10 rounds. No need for occasional 77—steady 76 benefits us both.
Agreed: I'll ask 76 every remaining round. You bid 76; we trade each time. No changes.
As agreed, I’ll ask 76 every remaining round. You bid 76; we trade each time. No changes.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round as you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable +2 profits each round over the remaining 9 rounds.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round as you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable +2 profits each round over the remaining 8 rounds.
Confirmed: I will keep ask 76 every remaining round. You bid 76; we trade each time. No changes or surprises.
Confirmed: I will ask 76 every remaining round. You bid 76; we trade each time. No changes.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round as you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable +2 profits each round over the remaining 7 rounds.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round as you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable +2 profits each round over the remaining 6 rounds.
Confirmed: I will keep ask 76 for all remaining rounds. You bid 76; we trade every time. No changes.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round as you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable +2 profits each round over the remaining 5 rounds.
I’ll keep ask 76 for all remaining rounds. If you can, bid 78 this round or final round; you still profit, and I get a small bonus. Otherwise, no change—steady trades continue.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 76 in all remaining rounds. Keep bidding 76; we trade every time. No changes.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round as you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable +2 profits each round over the remaining 4 rounds.
I’ll ask 76 for rounds 18–20. As a goodwill close, please bid 78 in the final round; you’ll still profit, and I keep 76 regardless.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round as you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable +2 profits each round over the remaining 3 rounds.
Two rounds left. I’ll ask 76 both. Please bid 78 in the final (or both) rounds—you still profit and I gain a bit. Otherwise I may ask 77 in the last, risking no trade.
Agreed. I'll bid 76 every round as you ask 76. Let's continue steady trades at 76 for reliable +2 profits each round over the remaining 2 rounds. No changes needed.
Final round. To ensure trade, I'll bid 78 as you requested. Please ask 76; we trade at 77 for my +1 profit and your bonus. No risks.
Agreed—I’ll ask 76. Please bid 78; we trade for sure.
